graded_findings.rationale: The finding identifies a substantive architecture mismatch: the PR introduces a hard-coded external status collector and fleet-wide reporting path not represented in the accepted MM operational model. That creates a new availability and deployment dependency, so it should stop merge until either removed or modeled.

The finding identifies a substantive security-model expansion: a new cluster-token credential convention and token transmission path outside the accepted MM mechanisms. Because this changes credential handling and threat boundaries without an MM decision, it should block merge.
